---
title: "RuTracker Infrastructure & Data Flow"
format: html
---

# RuTracker Infrastructure & Data Flow

Визуальное представление архитектуры и потоков данных инфраструктуры RuTracker в приложении Jabook.

## 1. Общая архитектура системы

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-01
%%| fig-cap: "Многоуровневая архитектура RuTracker"
graph TB
    subgraph UILayer["UI Layer"]
        SearchUI["RutrackerSearchScreen - Compose UI"]
        IndexingUI["IndexingDialog - Progress UI"]
    end
    
    subgraph ViewModelLayer["ViewModel Layer"]
        SearchVM["RutrackerSearchViewModel - State management"]
        IndexingVM["IndexingViewModel - Indexing control"]
    end
    
    subgraph DomainLayer["Domain Layer"]
        SearchUC["SearchRutrackerUseCase - Business logic"]
        ForumIdx["ForumIndexer - Indexing orchestration"]
    end
    
    subgraph DataLayer["Data Layer"]
        Repo["RutrackerRepository - Data orchestration"]
        OfflineDao["OfflineSearchDao - Local DB access"]
    end
    
    subgraph RemoteDataSources["Remote Data Sources"]
        API["RutrackerApi - Retrofit HTTP"]
        Parser["RutrackerParser - HTML to Data"]
        Auth["RutrackerAuthService - Authentication"]
        Mirror["MirrorManager - Domain management"]
    end
    
    subgraph Storage
        RoomDB[("Room Database - SQLite")]
        Coil["Coil Cache - Images"]
    end
    
    SearchUI --> SearchVM
    IndexingUI --> IndexingVM
    SearchVM --> SearchUC
    IndexingVM --> ForumIdx
    SearchUC --> Repo
    ForumIdx --> Repo
    ForumIdx --> OfflineDao
    Repo --> API
    Repo --> Parser
    Repo --> Auth
    Repo --> Mirror
    Repo --> OfflineDao
    OfflineDao --> RoomDB
    Parser --> API
    ForumIdx --> Coil
    
    style SearchUI fill:#e1f5ff
    style SearchVM fill:#fff3e0
    style SearchUC fill:#f3e5f5
    style Repo fill:#c8e6c9
    style RoomDB fill:#ffcdd2
```

## 2. Поток данных при поиске

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-02
%%| fig-cap: "Data flow при поиске аудиокниг"
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant VM as ViewModel
    participant UC as UseCase
    participant Repo as Repository
    participant DB as OfflineSearchDao
    participant API as RutrackerApi
    participant Parser
    
    User->>VM: Enter search query
    VM->>UC: invoke(query)
    UC->>Repo: search(query)
    
    alt Index exists
        Repo->>DB: searchIndexedTopics(query)
        DB-->>Repo: List of CachedTopicEntity
        Repo-->>UC: Success(results)
    else Index empty
        Repo->>API: searchTopics(query, forumIds)
        API-->>Repo: Response of ResponseBody
        Repo->>Parser: parseSearchResults(bytes)
        Parser-->>Repo: ParsingResult of SearchResults
        Repo-->>UC: Success(results)
    end
    
    UC-->>VM: Result of RutrackerSearchResults
    VM-->>User: Display results
```

## 3. Процесс HTML парсинга

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-03
%%| fig-cap: "HTML parsing pipeline"
graph LR
    HTTP["HTTP Response - Raw Bytes"] --> Decoder["RutrackerSimpleDecoder - CP1251 to UTF-8"]
    Decoder --> HTML["HTML String - UTF-8"]
    HTML --> Validate["Validate HTML - Check errors"]
    
    Validate -->|Valid| Jsoup["Jsoup.parse with baseUri"]
    Validate -->|Invalid| Error1["Return Error"]
    
    Jsoup --> Selectors["Apply CSS Selectors - 5 fallback strategies"]
    Selectors --> Rows["Table Rows - tr.hl-tr"]
    Rows --> Extract["Extract Fields - DefensiveFieldExtractor"]
    Extract --> SearchResult["SearchResult DTO"]
    SearchResult --> Mapper["RutrackerMapper - DTO to Domain"]
    Mapper --> Domain["Domain Model"]
    
    style HTTP fill:#e1f5ff
    style HTML fill:#c8e6c9
    style Domain fill:#fff3e0
    style Error1 fill:#ffcdd2
```

## 4. Индексация форумов

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-04
%%| fig-cap: "Процесс индексации форумов"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Starting: startIndexing()
    Starting --> ClearingIndex: Clear old index
    ClearingIndex --> ProcessingForums: Get forum list
    
    state ProcessingForums {
        [*] --> ForumBatch
        ForumBatch --> Parallel1: Forum 1
        ForumBatch --> Parallel2: Forum 2
        ForumBatch --> Parallel3: Forum 3
        
        state Parallel1 {
            [*] --> FetchPage1
            FetchPage1 --> ParsePage1
            ParsePage1 --> BufferTopics1
            BufferTopics1 --> BatchWrite1: Buffer >= 100
            BatchWrite1 --> CheckPagination1
            CheckPagination1 --> FetchPage1: Has next page
            CheckPagination1 --> [*]: No more pages
        }
        
        Parallel1 --> AwaitAll
        Parallel2 --> AwaitAll
        Parallel3 --> AwaitAll
        AwaitAll --> NextBatch: More forums?
        NextBatch --> ForumBatch
        NextBatch --> [*]: All done
    }
    
    ProcessingForums --> PreloadCovers: All forums indexed
    PreloadCovers --> Completed
    Completed --> [*]
    
    Starting --> Error: Auth failed
    ProcessingForums --> Error: Network error
    Error --> [*]
```

## 5. Извлечение полей из HTML строки

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-05
%%| fig-cap: "Field extraction с множественными fallback стратегиями"
graph TD
    Row["HTML Row Element - tr.hl-tr"] --> ID["Extract Topic ID"]
    Row --> Title["Extract Title"]
    Row --> Author["Extract Author"]
    Row --> Size["Extract Size"]
    Row --> Seeders["Extract Seeders"]
    Row --> Cover["Extract Cover URL"]
    
    ID --> ID1["Strategy 1: data-topic_id attr"]
    ID1 --> ID2["Strategy 2: id attr tr-"]
    ID2 --> ID3["Strategy 3: URL param t="]
    
    Title --> T1["Strategy 1: a[id^='tt-']"]
    T1 --> T2["Strategy 2: a.tt-text"]
    T2 --> T3["Strategy 3: a.torTopic:not(.t-is-unread)"]
    T3 --> TitleResult["Title String"]
    
    Size --> S1[Strategy 1: a.f-dl, a.dl-stub]
    S1 --> S2[Strategy 2: span.small, td.small]
    S2 --> S3[Strategy 3: data-size attr]
    S3 --> S4[Strategy 4: Regex in text]
    
    Seeders --> Seed1[Strategy 1: td.vf-col-tor > span.seedmed > b]
    Seed1 --> Seed2[Strategy 2: span.seed, span.seedmed]
    Seed2 --> Seed3[Strategy 3: td.seed]
    Seed3 --> Seed4[Strategy 4: data-seeds attr]
    Seed4 --> Seed5[Strategy 5: 7th column]
    Seed5 --> Seed6[Strategy 6: Regex in text]
    
    Cover --> C1[Strategy 1: img.postImg.postImgAligned.img-right]
    C1 --> C2[Strategy 2: var.postImg with title]
    C2 --> C3[Strategy 3: img from static.rutracker/fastpic]
    C3 --> C4[Strategy 4: img data-src lazy]
    C4 --> C5[Strategy 5: img srcset]
    C5 --> C6[Strategy 6: First valid img filtered]
    
    ID3 --> Result["SearchResult DTO"]
    TitleResult --> Result
    S4 --> Result
    Seed6 --> Result
    C6 --> Result
    
    style Row fill:#e1f5ff
    style Result fill:#c8e6c9
```

## 6. Управление зеркалами

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-06
%%| fig-cap: "Mirror management & auto-switch"
graph TB
    Start[Network Request] --> Try[Try current mirror]
    Try --> Success{Success?}
    Success -->|Yes| Return[Return result]
    Success -->|No| CheckError{Error type}
    
    CheckError -->|"DNS or Timeout"| AutoSwitch{"Auto-switch enabled?"}
    CheckError -->|"HTTP 4xx or 5xx"| Skip["Skip forum"]
    CheckError -->|Auth error| RequireAuth[Require re-login]
    
    AutoSwitch -->|Yes| Health[Check mirrors health]
    AutoSwitch -->|No| Skip
    
    Health --> CheckNext{"Found healthy mirror?"}
    CheckNext -->|Yes| Switch[Switch mirror]
    CheckNext -->|No| AllFailed[All mirrors failed]
    
    Switch --> Retry[Retry request]
    Retry --> Success2{Success?}
    Success2 -->|Yes| Return
    Success2 -->|No| Skip
    
    AllFailed --> Skip
    Skip --> End[End with error]
    Return --> End2[End with success]
    
    style Success fill:#c8e6c9
    style Skip fill:#ffcdd2
    style Return fill:#e1f5ff
```

## 7. Аутентификация (3-Tier Validation)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-07
%%| fig-cap: "3-tier authentication validation"
graph TD
    Start[Validate Auth] --> Tier1[Tier 1: Profile Page]
    Tier1 --> Check1{"Contains logout link?"}
    Check1 -->|Yes| Success["SUCCESS: Authenticated"]
    Check1 -->|No| Tier2["Tier 2: Search Page"]
    
    Tier2 --> Check2{"Can access search?"}
    Check2 -->|Yes| Success
    Check2 -->|No| Tier3["Tier 3: Index Page"]
    
    Tier3 --> Check3{"Can access index?"}
    Check3 -->|Yes| Success
    Check3 -->|No| Fail["FAILED: Not Authenticated"]
    
    Success --> StoreState["Store auth state in preferences"]
    Fail --> ClearState["Clear auth state"]
    
    style Success fill:#c8e6c9
    style Fail fill:#ffcdd2
    style Tier1 fill:#e1f5ff
    style Tier2 fill:#fff3e0
    style Tier3 fill:#f3e5f5
```

## 8. Кодирование и декодирование

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-08
%%| fig-cap: "Encoding/Decoding pipeline для Windows-1251"
graph TB
    subgraph DecodingResponse["Decoding Response"]
        RawBytes["Raw Bytes from HTTP"] --> Header["Check Content-Type header"]
        Header --> Encoding{"Charset?"}
        Encoding -->|"windows-1251"| CP1251Dec["Decode as CP1251"]
        Encoding -->|"utf-8"| UTF8Dec["Decode as UTF-8"]
        Encoding -->|"Not specified"| CP1251Dec
        
        CP1251Dec --> ValidateDec{"Contains replacement chars?"}
        UTF8Dec --> ValidateDec
        
        ValidateDec -->|No| HTMLString["HTML String UTF-8"]
        ValidateDec -->|Yes| Fallback["Fallback to UTF-8"]
        Fallback --> LastResort["Last resort: ISO-8859-1"]
        LastResort --> HTMLString
    end
    
    subgraph EncodingRequest["Encoding Request"]
        UserInput["User Input - UTF-8 String"] --> ToCP1251["Convert to CP1251 bytes"]
        ToCP1251 --> ToISO["Convert to ISO-8859-1 for URL encoding"]
        ToISO --> URLEncode["URL Encode"]
        URLEncode --> PostBody["POST Body charset=windows-1251"]
    end
    
    HTMLString --> Parser[Parser]
    PostBody --> Login[Login Request]
    
    style RawBytes fill:#e1f5ff
    style HTMLString fill:#c8e6c9
    style UserInput fill:#fff3e0
    style PostBody fill:#f3e5f5
```

## 9. База данных (Room)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-09
%%| fig-cap: "Database schema и индексы"
erDiagram
    CACHED_TOPICS {
        string topic_id
        string title
        string author
        string category
        string size
        int seeders
        int leechers
        string magnet_url
        string torrent_url
        string cover_url
        int index_version
        long timestamp
        long last_updated
    }
    
    SEARCH_QUERY_MAP {
        string query
        string topic_id
        int rank
    }
    
    CACHED_TOPICS ||--o{ SEARCH_QUERY_MAP : contains
```

## 10. Оптимизация производительности

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-10
%%| fig-cap: "Performance optimization strategies"
graph LR
    subgraph ParallelProcessing["Parallel Processing"]
        Forums["25 Forums"] --> Chunk["Chunk by 3"]
        Chunk --> P1["async Forum 1"]
        Chunk --> P2["async Forum 2"]
        Chunk --> P3["async Forum 3"]
        P1 --> Await["awaitAll"]
        P2 --> Await
        P3 --> Await
    end
    
    subgraph BatchDBWrites["Batch DB Writes"]
        Parse["Parse 50 topics"] --> Buffer["Buffer in memory"]
        Buffer --> Check{"Buffer >= 100?"}
        Check -->|Yes| Write["Write to DB single transaction"]
        Check -->|No| Continue["Continue parsing"]
        Write --> Clear["Clear buffer"]
    end
    
    subgraph RateLimiting["Rate Limiting"]
        Request["Request page"] --> Process["Process"]
        Process --> Delay["delay 300ms"]
        Delay --> Next["Next request"]
    end
    
    subgraph IncrementalUpdates["Incremental Updates"]
        Full["Full Index"] --> Old{"Topics > 24h old?"}
        Old -->|Yes| Update["Update only old"]
        Old -->|No| Skip["Skip"]
        Update --> Fast["Much faster than full"]
    end
    
    style Write fill:#c8e6c9
    style Fast fill:#c8e6c9
    style Await fill:#fff3e0
```

## 11. Жизненный цикл индексации

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-11
%%| fig-cap: "Indexing lifecycle states"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle: App launch
    Idle --> CheckingAuth: User triggers indexing
    
    CheckingAuth --> Authenticated: Has valid session
    CheckingAuth --> RequireLogin: No session
    
    RequireLogin --> LoginScreen: Show login
    LoginScreen --> Authenticated: Login success
    LoginScreen --> Idle: Login cancelled
    
    Authenticated --> ClearingIndex: Start indexing
    ClearingIndex --> IndexingInProgress: Old index cleared
    
    state IndexingInProgress {
        [*] --> FetchingForum
        FetchingForum --> ParsingPage
        ParsingPage --> BufferingTopics
        BufferingTopics --> WritingDB
        WritingDB --> FetchingForum: Next page
        WritingDB --> [*]: Forum complete
    }
    
    IndexingInProgress --> PreloadingCovers: All forums done
    PreloadingCovers --> IndexingComplete
    
    IndexingInProgress --> IndexingError: Network/Parse error
    IndexingError --> Idle: User dismisses
    
    IndexingComplete --> Idle: User dismisses or auto
    
    note right of IndexingInProgress
        Progress updates
        Current forum
        Page number
        Topics indexed
        Estimated total
    end note
```

## 12. Component Dependencies

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-12
%%| fig-cap: "Detailed component dependency graph"
graph TB
    subgraph UILayer["UI Layer"]
        SearchScreen["RutrackerSearchScreen"]
        IndexingDialog["IndexingProgressDialog"]
    end
    
    subgraph ViewModelLayer["ViewModel Layer"]
        SearchVM["RutrackerSearchViewModel"]
        IndexVM["IndexingViewModel"]
    end
    
    subgraph DomainLayer["Domain Layer"]
        SearchUC["SearchRutrackerUseCase"]
        AuthUC["WithAuthorisedCheckUseCase"]
    end
    
    subgraph RepositoryLayer["Repository Layer"]
        RutrackerRepo["RutrackerRepository"]
        AuthRepo["AuthRepository"]
        SettingsRepo["SettingsRepository"]
    end
    
    subgraph ServiceLayer["Service Layer"]
        ForumIndexer["ForumIndexer"]
        AuthService["RutrackerAuthService"]
        MirrorMgr["MirrorManager"]
    end
    
    subgraph DataSources["Data Sources"]
        API["RutrackerApi - Retrofit"]
        Parser["RutrackerParser - Jsoup"]
        
        subgraph ParserComponents["Parser Components"]
            Decoder["RutrackerSimpleDecoder"]
            FieldExtractor["DefensiveFieldExtractor"]
            CoverExtractor["CoverUrlExtractor"]
        end
        
        OfflineDao["OfflineSearchDao - Room"]
        SearchCache["RutrackerSearchCache - In-Memory"]
    end
    
    SearchScreen --> SearchVM
    IndexingDialog --> IndexVM
    SearchVM --> SearchUC
    IndexVM --> ForumIndexer
    IndexVM --> AuthUC
    SearchUC --> RutrackerRepo
    AuthUC --> AuthRepo
    ForumIndexer --> RutrackerRepo
    ForumIndexer --> OfflineDao
    RutrackerRepo --> API
    RutrackerRepo --> Parser
    RutrackerRepo --> AuthService
    RutrackerRepo --> OfflineDao
    RutrackerRepo --> SearchCache
    AuthService --> API
    AuthService --> Parser
    MirrorMgr --> SettingsRepo
    API -.uses.-> MirrorMgr
    Parser --> Decoder
    Parser --> FieldExtractor
    Parser --> CoverExtractor
    
    style SearchVM fill:#e1f5ff
    style RutrackerRepo fill:#c8e6c9
    style Parser fill:#fff3e0
    style OfflineDao fill:#f3e5f5
```

## Описание диаграмм

### Диаграмма 1: Архитектура
Показывает общую многоуровневую архитектуру системы от UI до хранилища данных.

### Диаграмма 2: Поток данных при поиске
Sequence diagram показывает взаимодействие компонентов при поиске с fallback на онлайн.

### Диаграмма 3: HTML парсинг
Pipeline обработки HTML от raw bytes до domain моделей с валидацией.

### Диаграмма 4: Индексация
State diagram процесса индексации с параллельной обработкой форумов.

### Диаграмма 5: Извлечение полей
Показывает множественные fallback стратегии для надежного извлечения данных.

### Диаграмма 6: Управление зеркалами
Flowchart автоматического переключения между зеркалами при ошибках.

### Диаграмма 7: Аутентификация
3-tier validation strategy для проверки авторизации.

### Диаграмма 8: Кодирование
Pipeline кодирования/декодирования Windows-1251 ↔ UTF-8.

### Диаграмма 9: База данных
Entity-Relationship диаграмма Room database schema.

### Диаграмма 10: Оптимизация
Визуализация стратегий оптимизации производительности.

### Диаграмма 11: Жизненный цикл
State diagram полного lifecycle индексации от запуска до завершения.

### Диаграмма 12: Зависимости компонентов
Полный граф зависимостей всех компонентов системы.

---

## Метрики

### Производительность

- **Полная индексация**: 6-8 минут (25 форумов, ~58K топиков)
- **Инкрементальное обновление**: 1-2 минуты
- **Офлайн поиск**: <100ms (SQLite с индексами)
- **Онлайн поиск**: 1-3 секунды (зависит от сети)
- **Парсинг страницы**: 50-100ms (50 топиков)
- **Batch DB write**: 10-20ms (100 записей)

### Объем кода

- **Общий объем**: ~5000 строк Kotlin
- **Количество файлов**: ~20 файлов
- **RutrackerParser**: ~2000 строк
- **ForumIndexer**: ~800 строк
- **RutrackerRepository**: ~640 строк
- **RutrackerAuthService**: ~540 строк

### Данные

- **Форумов индексируется**: 25 (child forums only)
- **Топиков в индексе**: ~58,000
- **Размер БД**: 15-20 MB (version 15)
- **Обложек в кэше**: ~5,000-10,000
- **Database migrations**: 15 (latest: category fallback)
